mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT p.* FROM fee_promotion p LEFT JOIN fee_promotion_merchant pm ON p.promotion_no = pm.promotion_no AND pm.merchant_no = #{merchantNo} AND pm.deleted = 0 WHERE p.deleted = 0 AND p.status = 2 AND p.start_time <= #{currentTime} AND p.end_time >= #{currentTime} AND ( p.target_type = 1 OR (p.target_type = 2 AND p.target_value = #{industryCode}) OR (p.target_type = 3 AND pm.id IS NOT NULL AND pm.status = 1) OR (p.target_type = 4 AND pm.id IS NOT NULL AND pm.status = 1) ) AND (p.total_quota IS NULL OR p.total_quota = 0 OR p.used_quota < p.total_quota) AND (pm.total_quota IS NULL OR pm.total_quota = 0 OR pm.used_quota < pm.total_quota) ORDER BY p.promotion_type ASC, p.created_at DESC

SELECT id, promotion_no, promotion_name, promotion_desc, promotion_type, target_type, target_value, fee_type, discount_fee_rate, fixed_fee_amount, max_discount_amount, start_time, end_time, duration_days, total_quota, used_quota, per_merchant_quota, status, operator_id, operator_name, remark, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM fee_promotion WHERE deleted = 0 AND promotion_no = #{promotionNo} LIMIT 1
